_readme: Per-set composition facts for the 24mm 'lights' set (32x20s ISO200 f/4, matched flats): the terrestrial foreground only. The background gate selects its sky statistically.

foreground._note: treeline arc across bottom+sides — a rect cannot model it. DERIVED from the stack: scripts/geometry/suggest_foreground.py 07-02-26/results/stack_lights.fit 07-02-26/work/fgmask_lights.npz --overlay=... (threshold 0.4x sky median = -42 sigma, border-anchored components, dilate 48; overlay eyeballed: silhouettes covered, smear tips partially — revisit with numbers if edge blocks misbehave)
